composition.description: Measured sample composition as a pymatgen formula string (e.g. "Fe2Mn4Ti4")

knowns.description: Known co-existing phases identified by XRD (list of formula strings)

mass_weights.description: Rietveld mass fractions for each known phase (same order as knowns)

predicted_error.description: Uncertainty in mass weights: 0 = precise, 1 = rough. Default 0.3

n_suggestions.description: Number of suggested next compositions to return. Default 5
